name: Oslofjord

seo.title: Oslofjord
seo.description: The fjord gives Oslo its waterfront identity, islands, ferries and easy access to nature from the city center.

heroText: The fjord gives Oslo its waterfront identity, islands, ferries and easy access to nature from the city center.
whyText: Oslofjord explains why Oslo works as both a capital city and a nature destination.
